finding_results.notes: Marisol's rebuttal now references only settings Salvador just named (meetings, church, studio), removing the unintroduced 'bed' detail.
The reveal now names overdose/heroin causality directly, and Marisol immediately presses verification standards (date, address, witness/911 timestamp) in the same exchanges.

The second call is condensed and no longer repeats the same checklist cadence; it adds a new institutional complication (Nora's legal hold and 9:00 a.m. upload demand) plus an evidence-preservation consequence.
Replaced recurring throat-tightening stress cue with a scene-specific physical signal (cup tremor tapping her teeth).

summary: Revised chapter_02 resolves all packet findings by tightening internal logic in the interview challenge, restoring explicit overdose causality with concurrent verification pressure, reducing duplicated sponsor-call guidance at the end while adding a new legal/evidence obstacle, and replacing the repeated throat-tightening somatic tell with a distinct AA-room stress marker.
